hero.title: Your padel & sports club in Mallorca
hero.subtitle: 7 padel courts, a 7-a-side football pitch, café bar and events. Play, train and enjoy just steps from Magaluf, all year round.

services.title: Everything you'll find here
services.subtitle: Much more than padel: a club to play, compete and hang out.

padel.title: Padel
padel.desc: 7 courts, a school for all ages and classes for every level.

football.title: 7-a-side football

events.title: Events
events.desc: Tournaments, birthdays, stag/hen dos and corporate events, made to measure.

cafe.title: Café bar
cafe.desc: Grab a drink before or after your game. Terrace, atmosphere and kids area.

shop.title: Shop
shop.desc: Rackets, clothing and gear from the top brands, with expert advice.

establishing.title: An open-air club in the heart of Magaluf

videoSection.title: We don't just rent rackets. We coach.
videoSection.desc: At Magaluf Sport Club you don't just come to play, you come to improve. School, coaching and community. We tell you in 25 seconds.

classesSection.title: Learn and improve with our coaches
classesSection.desc: Padel school for kids and adults, with a team of qualified coaches. Private and group classes, from beginner to advanced.

shopSection.title: Your padel shop at the club
shopSection.desc: The best brands in rackets, clothing and accessories. Try them and take them home the same day, with advice from our team.

padelSection.title: Play padel all year round
padelSection.desc: 7 courts in top condition, a school for kids and adults and classes for every level. Book your court in seconds with Playtomic.

footballSection.title: Your 7-a-side game, sorted
footballSection.desc: State-of-the-art turf, floodlights and fully equipped changing rooms. Get your team together and play day or night.

holidays.title: Padel Holidays in Mallorca
holidays.desc: 7 days and 6 nights at a hotel with half board, daily coaching and supervised matches. The perfect way to mix padel with a holiday in the sun.
includes: 7 days / 6 nights at a 4★ hotel with spa

events.desc: From padel tournaments and kids' leagues to birthdays, stag/hen dos and corporate events. We organise it for you.
